channel.title: Firefox-Extension on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Firefox-Extension on Arrans github.io

item.title: iamadamdev/bypass-paywalls-chrome
item.description: Bypass Paywalls web browser extension for Chrome and Firefox.

item.title: pbek/QOwnNotes
item.description: QOwnNotes is a plain-text file notepad and todo-list manager with Markdown support and Nextcloud / ownCloud integration.
